creator: nork@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi thierry.

On Sun,  1 Nov 2009 17:18:04 +0100 (CET)
Thierry Thomas <thierry@freebsd.org> wrote:
> 	At the moment, the port net/liveMedia does not install shared
> 	libraries, but only the static ones, and this breaks RTSP support
> 	in multimedia/vlc, because it fails to dlopen liveMedia.

	I think that liveMedia is not guilty.

	[NOTE]
	The first, I didn't/don't/will not support shared library of
	liveMedia.  Because liveMedia often broke ABI, so many many
	times.  I can't follow-up changing ABI.


> >How-To-Repeat:
> 	When built against static liveMedia libs, vlc chokes on rtsp with
> 	the following messages:

	I confirmed.

> VLC media player 1.0.1 Goldeneye
> [0x34136100] main libvlc warning: cannot load module `/usr/local/lib/vlc/demux/liblive555_plugin.so' (/usr/local/lib/vlc/demux/liblive555_plugin.so: Undefined symbol "_ZTI9HashTable")

	$ echo _ZTI9HashTable | c++filt
	typeinfo for HashTable

	According to nm -g /usr/local/live/*/lib*.a, I found _ZTI9HashTable
	symbol in libUsageEnvironment.a.  So I'm thinking that
	liblive555_plugin.so doesn't -lUsageEnvironment.

> [0x34136100] main libvlc warning: cannot load module `/usr/local/lib/vlc/gui/libskins2_plugin.so' (/usr/local/lib/vlc/gui/libskins2_plugin.so: Undefined symbol "_ZN10X11FactoryC1EP13intf_thread_t")

	$ echo _ZN10X11FactoryC1EP13intf_thread_t | c++filt
	X11Factory::X11Factory(intf_thread_t*)

	I think that vlc's plugins have another problems.


	Hum...
libtool: link: c++ -shared -nostdlib /usr/lib/crti.o /usr/lib/crtbeginS.o  .libs/liblive555_plugin_la-live555.o .libs/liblive555_plugin_la-asf.o .libs/liblive555_plugin_la-buffer.o  -Wl,--whole-archive ../../compat/.libs/libcompat.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/ports/multimedia/vlc/work/vlc-1.0.1/src/.libs -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/ports/multimedia/vlc/work/fake//usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/live/UsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment -L/usr/local/live/groupsock -lgrou psock -L/usr/local/live/BasicUsageEnvironment -lBasicUsageEnvironment -L/usr/local/live/liveMedia -lliveMedia ../../src/.libs/libvlccore.so -L/usr/lib -lstdc++ -lm -lpthread -lc -lgcc_s /usr/lib/crtendS.o /usr/lib/crtn.o  -march=opteron -pthread -pthread   -pthread -Wl,-soname -Wl,liblive555_plugin.so -o .libs/liblive555_plugin.so

	The library using _ZTI9HashTable is -lBasicUsageEnvironment, but
	in this case, -lUsageEnvironment -> -lBasicUsageEnvironment.  So,
	to fix, I suggest following patch:

multimedia/vlc/files/patch-configure
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
--- configure.orig	2009-07-28 07:25:54.000000000 +0900
+++ configure	2009-11-02 02:56:25.303170104 +0900
@@ -37516,8 +37516,8 @@
 
 done
 
-     other_libs="-lgroupsock -lBasicUsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment"
-     other_libs_pic="-lgroupsock_pic -lBasicUsageEnvironment_pic -lUsageEnvironment_pic"
+     other_libs="-lgroupsock -lUsageEnvironment -lBasicUsageEnvironment"
+     other_libs_pic="-lgroupsock_pic -lUsageEnvironment_pic -lBasicUsageEnvironment_pic"
       if test "${SYS}" = "mingw32"; then
         # add ws2_32 for closesocket, select, recv
         other_libs="$other_libs -lws2_32"
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 

	I don't test it, so if you confirm, please report to upstream by
	fixing configure.ac.

	Thank you.
